center.name: 印度东部
center.summary: 印度东部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括蓝孔雀、纹背捕蛛鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In India, it is found in the Eastern Indian states. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and montane forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In India, it is found across the country from the Indus valley in the north-west to Assam in the north-east, and from Himalayas in the north to the southern tip, except for the marshlands of Sunderbans in East India
